Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing

Class AbstractSlicer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractSlicer
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractBackwardSlicer
public abstract class AbstractSlicer extends Object
Defines the basic functionality for slicing algorithms.

    Computes the aliases specified by the updates of the current Node at the application PosInOccurrence and computes the current this reference.

  • Method Details

    • slice

      public ImmutableArray<Node> slice(Node seedNode, Term term, ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> sec) throws ProofInputException
      Computes the slice.
      Parameters:
      seedNode - The seed Node to start slicing at.
      term - The seed Term.
      sec - The optional ISymbolicEquivalenceClasses to consider.
      Returns:
      The computed slice.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • slice

      public ImmutableArray<Node> slice(Node seedNode, ReferencePrefix seedLocation, ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> sec) throws ProofInputException
      Computes the slice.
      Parameters:
      seedNode - The seed Node to start slicing at.
      seedLocation - The seed ReferencePrefix.
      sec - The optional ISymbolicEquivalenceClasses to consider.
      Returns:
      The computed slice.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

      sec - The optional ISymbolicEquivalenceClasses to consider.
      Returns:
      The computed slice.

      seedNode - The seed Node to start slicing at.
      seedLocation - The seed Location.
      sec - The optional ISymbolicEquivalenceClasses to consider.

      The computed slice.

    • analyzeSequent

      protected AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo analyzeSequent(Node node, ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> sec)
      Computes the aliases specified by the updates of the current Node at the application PosInOccurrence and computes the current this reference.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node to analyze.
      Returns:
      The computed AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo or null if the Node is not supported.

    • analyzeEquivalenceClasses

      protected void analyzeEquivalenceClasses(Services services, ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> sec, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> aliases, ReferencePrefix thisReference)
      Analyzes the given ISymbolicEquivalenceClasses.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      sec - The ISymbolicEquivalenceClass to analyze.
      aliases - The alias Map to fill.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).

      services - The Services to use.
      sequent - The Sequent to analyze.
      aliases - The alias Map to fill.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).

    • analyzeUpdates

      protected void analyzeUpdates(ImmutableList<Term> updates, Services services, HeapLDT heapLDT, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> aliases, Map<ProgramVariable,Term> localValues, ExecutionContext ec, ReferencePrefix thisReference)
      Utility method used by analyzeSequent(de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Node, org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableList<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.ISymbolicEquivalenceClass>) to analyze the given updates.
      Parameters:
      updates - The update Terms to analyze.
      services - The Services to use.
      heapLDT - The HeapLDT of the Services.
      aliases - The alias Map to fill.
      localValues - The local values to fill.
      ec - The current ExecutionContext.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).

    • analyzeUpdate

      protected void analyzeUpdate(Term term, Services services, HeapLDT heapLDT, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> aliases, Map<ProgramVariable,Term> localValues, ExecutionContext ec, ReferencePrefix thisReference)
      Recursive utility method used by analyzeUpdates(org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableList<de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Term>, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services, de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.HeapLDT, java.util.Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.Location, java.util.SortedSet<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.Location>>, java.util.Map<de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramVariable, de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Term>, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ExecutionContext, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ReferencePrefix) to analyze a given update.
      Parameters:
      term - The update Term to analyze.
      services - The Services to use.
      heapLDT - The HeapLDT of the Services.
      aliases - The alias Map to fill.
      localValues - The local values to fill.
      ec - The current ExecutionContext.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).

    • listModifiedLocations

      protected void listModifiedLocations(Term term, Services services, HeapLDT heapLDT, List<Location> listToFill, ExecutionContext ec, ReferencePrefix thisReference, Set<Location> relevantLocations, Node node) throws ProofInputException

      heapLDT - The HeapLDT of the Services.

    • listModifiedHeapLocations

      protected void listModifiedHeapLocations(Term term, Services services, HeapLDT heapLDT, List<Location> listToFill, ReferencePrefix thisReference, Set<Location> relevantLocations, Node node) throws ProofInputException
      Recursive utility method used by listModifiedLocations(de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Term, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services, de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.HeapLDT, java.util.List<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.Location>, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ExecutionContext, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ReferencePrefix, java.util.Set<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.Location>, de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Node) to analyze a given update.
      Parameters:

      services - The Services to use.
      heapLDT - The HeapLDT of the Services.
      listToFill - The result List with Locations to fill.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • updateAliases

      protected void updateAliases(Services services, Location first, Location second, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> aliases, ReferencePrefix thisReference)
      Adds the found alias consisting of first and second ReferencePrefix to the alias Map. If required, all participating entries in the Map are updated to ensure consistency.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      first - The first alias.
      second - The second alias.
      aliases - The alias Map to update.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).

      protected SortedSet<Location> createSortedSet()
      Creates a SortedSet which ensures that the elements are sorted.
      Returns:
      The new created SortedSet.

      services - The Services to use.
      referencePrefix - The ReferencePrefix.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      Returns:
      The representative alias.

      protected Location normalizeAlias(Services services, Location location, AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info)

      location - The Location.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.

      Normalizes the given array index.
      Parameters:
      access - The Access representing an array index.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      Returns:
      The normalized array access.

    • computeRepresentativeAlias

      protected Location computeRepresentativeAlias(Location location, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> aliases)
      Computes the representative alias of the given Location.
      Parameters:
      location - The given Location.
      aliases - The available aliases.
      Returns:
      The representative alias.

    • toReferencePrefix

      protected ReferencePrefix toReferencePrefix(SourceElement sourceElement)
      Computes the ReferencePrefix of the given SourceElement.
      Parameters:
      sourceElement - The SourceElement to work with.
      Returns:
      The ReferencePrefix or null if the SourceElement can't be represented as ReferencePrefix.

    • removeRelevant

      protected boolean removeRelevant(Services services, ReferencePrefix sourceElement, Set<Location> relevantLocations, AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info)
      Checks if the given SourceElement is directly or indirectly contained (aliased) in the Set of relevant locations. If it is contained, the element will be removed.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      sourceElement - The SourceElement to check.
      relevantLocations - The Set with locations of interest.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      Returns:
      true is relevant and was removed, false is not relevant and nothing has changed.

    • removeRelevant

      protected boolean removeRelevant(Services services, Location location, Set<Location> relevantLocations, AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info)
      Checks if the given Location is directly or indirectly contained (aliased) in the Set of relevant locations. If it is contained, the element will be removed.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      location - The Location to check.
      relevantLocations - The Set with locations of interest.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      Returns:
      true is relevant and was removed, false is not relevant and nothing has changed.

    • performRemoveRelevant

      protected boolean performRemoveRelevant(Services services, Location normalized, Set<Location> relevantLocations, AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info)
      Checks if the given Location is directly or indirectly contained (aliased) in the Set of relevant locations. If it is contained, the element will be removed.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      normalized - The Location to check.
      relevantLocations - The Set with locations of interest.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      Returns:
      true is relevant and was removed, false is not relevant and nothing has changed.

    • toLocation

      protected Location toLocation(Services services, ReferencePrefix prefix, ExecutionContext ec, ReferencePrefix thisReference)
      Converts the given ReferencePrefix into a Location.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      prefix - The ReferencePrefix to convert.
      ec - The current ExecutionContext.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).
      Returns:
      The Location representing the given ReferencePrefix.

    • toLocationRecursive

      protected ImmutableList<Access> toLocationRecursive(Services services, ReferencePrefix prefix, ExecutionContext ec, ReferencePrefix thisReference, ImmutableList<Access> children)
      Utility method used by toLocation(de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ReferencePrefix, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ExecutionContext, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.ReferencePrefix) to recursively extract the Access instances.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      prefix - The ReferencePrefix to work with.
      ec - The current ExecutionContext.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).
      children - The already known child Accesss.
      Returns:
      An ImmutableList containing all Accesss of the ReferencePrefix in the order of access.

      Converts the given Expressions into Terms.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      expressions - The Expressions to convert.
      ec - The current ExecutionContext.
      Returns:
      The created Terms.

      public static Term toTerm(Services services, Expression expression, ExecutionContext ec)
      Converts the given Expression into a Term.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      expression - The Expression to convert.
      ec - The current ExecutionContext.
      Returns:
      The created Term.

    • toLocation

      public static Location toLocation(Services services, Term term)
      Converts the given Term into a Location.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      term - The Term to convert.
      Returns:
      The Location or null if the Term could not be represented as Location.

    • findNewAlternative

      protected Location findNewAlternative(SortedSet<Location> oldAlternatives, SortedSet<Location> newAlternatives)
      Returns the first found alternative which is still valid.
      Parameters:
      oldAlternatives - The old alternatives.
      newAlternatives - The new alternatives.
      Returns:
      The found alternative or null if not available.

    • computeFirstCommonPrefixLength

      public static <T> int computeFirstCommonPrefixLength(ImmutableList<ImmutableList<T>> candidates, ImmutableList<T> toCheck)
      Computes the length of a common prefix.
      Parameters:
      candidates - The possible candidates.
      toCheck - The ImmutableList to check.
      Returns:
      The common prefix length which is 0 if no elements are common.

    • startsWith

      public static <T> boolean startsWith(ImmutableList<T> list, ImmutableList<T> prefix)
      Checks if the given ImmutableList starts with the given prefix.
      Parameters:
      list - The List to check.
      prefix - The prefix to check.
      Returns:
      true the first elements in the ImmutableList are the prefix, false if the first elements are not equal to the prefix.
